content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Chain Lightning
description: A Maliwan spell grenade that throws a straight lightning bolt which detonates on contact with a solid surface or at the end of its travel. The bolt can slip through some bits of geometry, giving it surprising reach, and the resulting shock can still chain into nearby enemies even if the direct hit misses.
notes: It works especially well with Gaige's Little Big Trouble skills, particularly Wires Don't Talk, Electrical Burn, and Myelin. It also fits naturally into Maya's Cataclysm setups and Krieg's Hellborn builds.

special.description: Fires a lightning bolt that chains shock damage between nearby enemies.

abilities: Slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
